name: Overpass API
description: The Overpass API is a read-only API that serves up custom selected parts of the OpenStreetMap (OSM) map data. It acts as a database over the web: the client sends a query to the API and gets back the data set that corresponds to the query. The API is optimized for data consumers that need a few elements within a glimpse or up to roughly 10 million elements in some minutes.
